summary: Completed testing of Admin Simplification + Payments Fixes Pack. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified. Admin sidebar simplified with correct navigation items. Service Leads, Payments Queue, and Orders pages working correctly. ProductPromoDetailModalV2 working with price/colors/sizes/carousel. Promo items show 'Request Customization Quote' button. TZS comma formatting verified in cart.

minor.issue: Console error 'orders.filter is not a function' on dashboard load - non-blocking but should be fixed

action_items: Fix 'orders.filter is not a function' error in AdminDashboard loadDashboardData function
seed_data_creation: Created test promotional material customization lead via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Simplification Pack fully tested. Sidebar has 22 nav items for admin role. Service Leads at /admin/service-leads shows ServiceLeadsCrmTable with leads from both 'leads' and 'service_requests' collections. Payments Queue at /admin/finance-queue shows FinancePaymentsQueuePage. Orders at /admin/orders shows AdminOrdersSplitViewV2 with split view. ProductPromoDetailModalV2 shows price with TZS comma formatting, colors, sizes, image carousel. Promo tab items show 'Request Customization Quote' button instead of 'Add to Cart'. Cart drawer shows TZS amounts with comma formatting (e.g., TZS 14,160).

backend: GET /api/admin-flow-fixes/finance/queue - Returns array of payment proofs ✓
frontend: Simplified admin sidebar has all expected nav items ✓
Marketplace has 3 tabs: Products, Services, Promotional Materials ✓
Regular products show 'Add to Cart' button ✓
Promo items show 'Request Customization Quote' button ✓
Cart drawer shows TZS with comma formatting ✓
